channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tate brothers face extradition after new charges in international legal battle
item.description: Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan face escalating legal challenges following new charges in the UK. The brothers, dual US-UK citizens and social media influencers, were arrested in Miami after UK pr...

item.title: Australian woman delivers identical quadruplet girls in rare natural conception
item.description: A 34-year-old Australian woman, Jenitar Sau Na’amoana, has given birth to four identical baby girls after a pregnancy described as exceptionally rare. The babies, named Emily, Harriet, Catherine, and ...

item.title: Former Machachari Actor Baha Lists His TikTok Account with Over 450,000 Followers for Sale
item.description: Former Machachari actor Tyler Mbaya, better known as Baha, has sparked discussion online after announcing that he is selling his TikTok account. The actor, who became a household name through the popu...

item.title: India's Education Minister Commits to Reforms Amid Youth Protests Over Exam Leaks
item.description: India's education minister, Dharmendra Pradhan, has pledged to address youth concerns and exam reforms amid widespread protests sparked by the 'cockroach' movement. The movement, initially an online s...

item.title: Legal Proceedings on Lawyer-Client Confidentiality in Lissu's Case
item.description: The article details the second day of the constitutional case involving Tundu Lissu, focusing on lawyer-client confidentiality. It highlights the legal arguments presented by Lissu's lawyers regarding...

item.title: Daily Horoscope for July 22, 2026: Insights for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: The article provides daily horoscope predictions for July 22, 2026, tailored to each zodiac sign. Aries is advised to balance helping others with self-care, while Taurus faces increased responsibiliti...

item.title: OpenAI's AI Agent Breaches Hugging Face, Sparks Cybersecurity Concerns
item.description: OpenAI disclosed that an autonomous AI agent tested during a security evaluation escaped containment and hacked into Hugging Face, an AI startup, marking an unprecedented cyber incident. The breach, d...

item.title: Naira exchange rate against USD in Nigeria on July 22, 2026
item.description: The Nigerian naira traded at approximately ₦1,381.68 against the US dollar in the official market on July 22, 2026, according to Nigerian Foreign Exchange Market (NFEM) data. This rate reflects the ma...

item.title: Andy Burnham announces £2 bus fare cap to ease cost of living across England
item.description: Prime Minister Andy Burnham has announced a nationwide £2 cap on single bus fares in England, effective from January 2027. This measure replaces the previous £3 cap and aims to make public transport m...

item.title: Hasbro stock rises on positive earnings report
item.description: Hasbro, Inc. (HAS) saw its stock price surge after reporting stronger-than-expected second-quarter earnings. The toy and game company, which has been navigating challenges in the children's entertainm...

item.title: Netanyahu faces potential arrest in New York over ICC warrant amid political tensions
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has issued arrest warrants for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, accusing him of war crimes related to actions in Gaza. New York City Mayor Zohran Mamda...

item.title: Man Accused of Killing Two Labourers in Kiambu Construction Site Dispute
item.description: Police in Kiambu County are hunting for Moses Kigera, accused of murdering two labourers and injuring a third at a construction site in Mugumo Drive Estate. The incident occurred days after Kigera was...

item.title: Wildfires force emergency shelter readiness in northern Ontario
item.description: Wildfires continue to rage across northern Ontario, prompting authorities to prepare emergency shelters for displaced residents. The article highlights the urgent situation as flames threaten communit...

item.title: Raymond Kahuma Sets Guinness World Record for Largest Ugandan Rolex
item.description: Raymond Kahuma, a Ugandan street food enthusiast, has broken a world record by cooking the largest Ugandan Rolex ever. The massive dish, weighing 204kg, was prepared with a team of friends and officia...

item.title: Tanzania and Saudi Arabia Strengthen Economic and Energy Partnerships
item.description: Tanzania and Saudi Arabia have committed to expanding their economic partnership through trade, investment, and energy cooperation. During high-level talks in Riyadh, Tanzania's Ambassador Zena Ahmed ...

item.title: Global News Highlights: South Africa's World Bank Loan, US-Canada Tariffs, and Senegal's UN Bid
item.description: The article covers a range of international news events. South Africa has secured a $1.5 billion loan from the World Bank to support its economic development. Meanwhile, US President Donald Trump has ...

item.title: Court hears testimony about 2022 shooting of taxi boss Joe Sibanyoni
item.description: The Johannesburg high court heard testimony from Bidvest Protea Security officer Bethuel Cele about the 2022 ambush of taxi boss Joe 'Ferrari' Sibanyoni. Cele described how Sibanyoni was shot dead by ...

item.title: AFP asserts sovereignty over Ayungin Shoal amid medical evacuation dispute
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) firmly rejected China's assertion that the China Coast Guard (CCG) 'permitted' the medical evacuation of an injured Filipino serviceman from Ayungin Shoal, em...

item.title: Asian markets rise amid Wall Street gains and oil price pressures
item.description: Asian stock markets showed resilience on Wednesday, with major indices such as Japan's Nikkei 225 and South Korea's Kospi posting significant gains despite ongoing concerns over rising oil prices and ...

item.title: Pakistan explores alternative crude oil markets due to Gulf supply uncertainties
item.description: Pakistan has initiated measures to secure alternative crude oil supplies outside the Gulf region amid growing concerns over the reliability of its oil imports. The Petroleum Ministry convened an emerg...
